plan.name: Example asset name
plan.author: Example author
plan.note: Dry-run does not call the Freepik download endpoint. Apply requires explicit no-snapshot approval because licensed downloads may create a provider record.

before_state.reason: Licensed downloads may create a Freepik account download/license record and local files. This source tool has no reliable before-state snapshot for those writes.

steps: Confirm the Freepik download/license endpoint returned a usable download URL.
Confirm the binary download was saved locally.
Confirm the destination file hash and inventory row were recorded.

recovery.restore_note: Licensed downloads and license records cannot be rolled back by this CLI. Local cleanup is manual.
